examples: Finally, Heracles restored some castanets given to him by the goddess Athena.
Heracles killed the Giants Alcyoneus and Porphyrion.
Heracles , Ares: We are the friends of justice.
In order to establish their credentials within the Hellenic world the Carthaginians conflated the Greek hero, Heracles (better known as Hercules), with Melqart, his Tyrian counterpart.
Feyenoord joined leaders Twente on seven points after winning 1-0 at Heracles Almelo, while Utrecht took third place also with two wins and a draw after being held 2-2 at home by Venlo.
